name: core.openwop.agents.code-reviewer
description: Code review agent. Reviews diffs or files for correctness, style, security, and design. Diff-aware prompting; cites file:line in findings. Pure-agent pack.
author: OpenWOP Working Group

agents.label: Code Reviewer Agent
agents.description: Reviews a diff or set of files for correctness, security, style, and design issues. Cites file:line for every finding. Severity-classifies findings (blocking / important / nit). Optionally fetches related files via openwop:core.files.fs-read to reason about cross-file impact.
